name: WhereTo
title_tag: Manage Your Business Information on Whereto App with Synup
detailed_paragraph:
WhereTo + Synup

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on WhereTo with Synup's listings & review management tools.

What is WhereTo?

WhereTo is likely a mobile or web-based application that helps users find nearby points of interest, businesses, and services. It may offer location-based recommendations and directions, making it a convenient tool for exploring and navigating new areas.

Why WhereTo + Synup?

  • Complete Control Over Listings: With the ability to manage your business listings on WhereTo, you maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring your business is represented accurately.
  • Broaden Your Reach: Adding your business to WhereTo through Synup means increased visibility. Help potential customers discover you, effectively expanding your reach.
  • Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by publishing accurate information on WhereTo.
  • Customer Engagement: View and respond back to reviews on WhereTo, fostering a positive relationship with your customers, showing that you value their feedback and are attentive to their needs.

How to integrate WhereTo + Synup?

The WhereTo integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage the WhereTo integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console.
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section.
  3. Click on the WhereTo logo to manage the Synup + WhereTo integration and associated settings.
integration_summary: For businesses, managing location data on Facebook now a breeze with Synup.

seo.title: WhereTo
seo.description: Maximize visibility on WhereTo. Synup integration ensures accurate business data for superior online presence and customer engagement.
